## Change

Describe the user-visible or deployment change.

## Verification

- [ ] `python tests/validate_repo.py`
- [ ] `scripts/doctor.ps1 -StaticOnly`
- [ ] No models, user media, outputs, credentials or absolute machine paths added
- [ ] `PROJECT_STATE.md`, `TASKS.md`, `DECISIONS.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` updated where applicable

## AI handoff

Agent/tool used, assumptions made, remaining risks, and the next safe step.
